hero.title: Hi, I’m Dival Sehgal
hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer — I build fast, scalable interfaces with Next.js, React, TypeScript and custom design systems.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I’m a frontend engineer who loves building clean, performant UIs with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
I enjoy creating scalable design systems, working on large-scale architectures, and building tools that improve developer workflows.

experience.description: Built and optimized large-scale Next.js apps with heavy polling, custom dashboards, and scalable design systems.
Developed reusable UI components, improved performance across multiple products, and collaborated with designers/engineers.

projects.name: Next.js Portfolio
projects.description: My personal portfolio + blog built with a custom SCSS design system, token generator, and MUI integration.
